# FTC Health Breach Notification Rule

Jurisdiction: United States - Federal
Region: US-FED
Citation: Health Breach Notification Rule
Authority: Federal Trade Commission / eCFR
Source URL: https://www.ecfr.gov/current/title-16/chapter-I/subchapter-C/part-318
Topics: security_breach, sensitive_data, notice_transparency, accountability
Keywords: FTC Health Breach Notification Rule, personal health record, PHR, health app breach

## Summary
FTC breach-notification rule for vendors of personal health records and related entities not covered by HIPAA breach rules.

## Key compliance obligations
- Determine whether health-app or PHR data triggers HBNR.
- Notify individuals, FTC, and media where required.
- Track breach investigation and notification timelines.
